title: Implement secretx-tencent-ssm backend
description: Implement the Tencent Cloud Secrets Manager (SSM) backend. Stub README exists at secretx-tencent-ssm/README.md. URI: secretx:tencent-ssm:<region>/<secret-name>. Auth via TENCENTCLOUD_SECRET_ID + TENCENTCLOUD_SECRET_KEY (CAM role fallback). API: ssm.<region>.tencentcloudapi.com using Tencent Cloud Signature V3. Implements SecretStore and WritableSecretStore.
